sourceSummary.oneLine: Samsung Electronics part approval sheet for material code MI63-02991A, SHEET-E2X_COLUMN STICKER_1, used with model 2G DETECTOR and supplied by K-WON Corporation.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Documents approval and checklist status for the specified part, including drawing/checklist references, EC history, dimensional specification, and restricted-substance requirement.
keyPoints: Material code is MI63-02991A and description is SHEET-E2X_COLUMN STICKER_1.
E.D DATE is 24-May-2022; EC History lists Rev. 00 dated 22.05.24 with comment 신규 승인.
Model is listed as 2G DETECTOR and vendor as K-WON Corporation.
Hole diameter specification is 7 ± 0.2 mm with result OK.
The part should not contain substances specified in 00Q2-0083K.
